system.name: Digital Triage System
system.description: AI-assisted digital triage system for primary care. Collects patient symptoms through structured interviews, applies clinical rules to determine urgency, and guides patients to appropriate care pathways.

modules.name: Triage Engine
modules.description: Core clinical decision logic - conducts symptom interviews and applies triage rules to determine patient urgency
modules.safety_rationale: Core clinical decision support - determines patient urgency levels

modules.name: Actions Module
modules.description: Patient action and workflow management - handles bookings, appointments, referrals
modules.safety_rationale: Executes clinical workflows including escalations and referrals

modules.name: Infrastructure Services
modules.safety_rationale: Supporting infrastructure, not directly involved in clinical decisions

modules.name: User Interfaces
modules.safety_rationale: User interface for clinical data collection and display - human factors critical

items.name: Interviewer Service
items.description: Questionnaire and interview management service - collects patient symptoms through structured interviews

items.name: Rule Engine
items.description: Clinical rule engine - evaluates triage rules to determine patient urgency and care recommendations

items.name: Actions Service
items.description: Patient action management - handles action creation, lifecycle, and execution including bookings, appointments, referrals

items.name: Object Storage Service
items.description: File storage service with encryption - stores configuration, documents, and media

items.name: Patient Application
items.description: Main patient-facing web application - micro-frontend architecture for triage flow

items.name: Triage Interview UI
items.description: Specialized triage interview interface - symptom collection and interview flow

items.name: Clinic Practitioner UI
items.description: Practitioner-facing interface for triage review and management
